title: Another Success of Doğuş University at the chess tournament

News

Another Success of Doğuş University at the chess tournament

Our student Özgür Şahin won the first place at the Intercollegiate Turkey Chess Tournament. Remaining unbeaten during the tournament, he was entitled to get the gold medal.

We would like to congratulate our student for bringing pride to our university and wish him continued success.
